channel.title: job on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in job on Nature Works

item.title: New job, new software
item.description:
I’ve started a new part-time job as Biodiversity Assistant, and found some rather cool software in the process

I started a new part-time job a couple of weeks ago as a Biodiversitiy Assistant for Ceredigion Council, and it’s been pretty full on. http://localhost:1313/blog/240401-obsidian/
